contract.title: The Violet Hour Inventory
contract.premise: A devotional clock appears on two authenticated inventories for the same hour.

evidence_assets.title: Devotional clock card
evidence_assets.public_summary: An auction card lists a devotional clock with conflicting room marks.

evidence_assets.title: Delivery ledger
evidence_assets.public_summary: A carrier ledger places the same clock at a second address.

hidden_truth.summary: The devotional clock repeats a pledged hour so the same debt can be collected twice.

artifacts.title: Devotional Clock Inventory Card
artifacts.public_summary: The clock card carries two room marks in the same clerk's hand and a clockmaker's repair note under the enamel.
artifacts.full_text: Inventory card: gilt devotional clock, violet enamel dial, marked for the west parlor and east study in the same hour. Margin: enamel lifted once by a clockmaker for a dial repair.

artifacts.title: Carrier Delivery Ledger
artifacts.public_summary: The carrier ledger records two deliveries for one devotional clock, the second initialed beside a tram stamp.
artifacts.full_text: Delivery ledger: one clock collected from Calder House, delivered twice under the same docket number. The second run is initialed beside a north tram stamp.

artifacts.title: Clockmaker Scratch
artifacts.public_summary: A case rubbing reveals a repair mark hidden under the enamel dial.
artifacts.full_text: Rubbing: clockmaker scratch under the violet enamel reads 'one hour owing.' The mark predates the auction card.

artifacts.title: Tram Witness Ticket
artifacts.public_summary: A witness ticket places the carrier away from one alleged delivery.
artifacts.full_text: Witness ticket: carrier punched the north tram at the minute the ledger says the second delivery was signed.

edges.public_summary: The violet enamel note points toward the clockmaker's hidden repair mark.
The delivery ledger conflicts with the tram witness timing.
The repair mark and witness ticket make the duplicate delivery harder to dismiss.

unlock_rules.award_reason: Asked a clockmaker to lift the enamel repair mark.
Checked the carrier's route against tram ticket punches.

allowed_reveal_strings: The clock's identity holds, but the hour does not.
The carrier ledger now has a witness contradiction.

rubric_facts.reveal: The clock's identity holds, but the hour does not.
The carrier ledger now has a witness contradiction.
